name: Helios-Class Courier
description: Drifting with a fractured cargo spine. Signs of intact avionics and one suspiciously warm compartment.

name: Orpheus Mining Barge
description: A slag-bitten ore hauler with cracked ore pods and polite levels of danger. Suspicious, frankly.

name: Ashfall Patrol Cutter
description: Old security vessel, still arguing with itself through broken threat sensors.

name: Morrowline Freighter
description: Commercial freighter with sealed cargo racks and a paperwork smell nobody requested.

name: Unmarked Research Skiff
description: A tiny black-lab skiff broadcasting nursery rhymes on a military band.

name: Kestrel Medical Frigate
description: A quarantined relief ship with sealed surgical stores and a failing containment beacon.

name: Cinder Refinery Hulk
description: An orbital refinery whose molten processing spine never received the shutdown order.

name: Pilgrim Habitat Ark
description: A silent colony ark with intact hydroponics decks and decades of unopened supply lockers.

name: Null-Signal Deep Probe
description: An experimental probe wrapped in sensor ghosts, exotic radiation, and extremely valuable questions.

name: Atlas Fuel Tanker
description: A slow tanker with stable outer tanks, unstable inner tanks, and enough warning labels to wallpaper a moon.

name: Revenant Drone Carrier
description: A compact carrier whose autonomous repair swarm has reclassified visitors as spare parts.

name: Frostline Cryo Tug
description: A refrigeration tug trailing frozen cargo pods and a glittering cloud of coolant crystals.
